response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR given_name : varchar
ATTR family_name : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR seat : varchar
ATTR baggage_belt : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY DepartureAirport
PK departure_airport_code
ATTR departure_airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR departure_airport_name : varchar
ATTR departure_location_code : varchar
ATTR departure_city : varchar

ENTITY ArrivalAirport
PK arrival_airport_code
ATTR arrival_airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR arrival_airport_name : varchar
ATTR arrival_location_code : varchar
ATTR arrival_city : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airplane_model : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_label : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_member_id
ATTR crew_member_id : varchar : PK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatusHistory
PK flight_id, status_date, status_time
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK
ATTR status_code : varchar : FK
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time

REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> DepartureAirport : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_code
REL Flight -> ArrivalAirport : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=registration_code
REL Flight -> Passenger : 1 -> N : FK=flight_id
REL Flight -> FlightStatusHistory : 1 -> N : FK=flight_id
REL FlightStatus -> FlightStatusHistory : 1 -> N : FK=status_code
REL CrewMember -> FlightStatusHistory : N -> N :
